_note: Updated daily at noon by Development. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Rebuilding the room editor — cleaner panels and easier entity selection
priorities.note: The inspector side panel is being rebuilt from scratch. Entity types (platforms, doors, keys) are getting a proper system so they behave consistently.
priorities.proposed_solution: Ship the rebuilt inspector with a consistent entity-type model and regression-test selection, editing, and export flows.

priorities.title: Adding version numbers to saved room files
priorities.note: Right now saved files have no version label. If we change the format later, old files could break silently. This needs fixing before any more format changes.
priorities.proposed_solution: Add an explicit version field to saved room JSON plus a documented migration path before any further format changes ship.

priorities.title: Connecting the AI image generator to the sprite editor
priorities.note: The server connection is working. The part where you actually generate sprites in the editor is still being built.
priorities.proposed_solution: Finish the in-editor UI that triggers image generation and applies results into the sprite workflow on top of the live server.

priorities.title: Room Copilot — time-boxed benchmark of a newer model after the founder sets schedule and switch criteria
priorities.note: Part of the Copilot readiness program with workbench PO and orchestration. Paused until commercial bar and timing are decided.
priorities.proposed_solution: Run the benchmark once criteria and a window are set; compare against the pinned model using the same fixtures QA and level design use.

opportunities.title: Performance pass on the room editor canvas after the rebuild is stable
opportunities.note: Deferred until the inspector rebuild and interaction paths are stable.
opportunities.proposed_solution: Profile the draw loop after stabilization, then apply dirty rectangles or OffscreenCanvas only where profiling shows need.

opportunities.title: Review Business Brand Guide v0.2 — Engineering cells in §1.3 matrix
opportunities.note: Marketing completed its pass. Source: docs/mv-business-brand-guide-pamphlet.html. Confirm messaging and positioning claims and claims/AI/legal guardrails are truthful vs shipped product and server behavior—no over-claim.
opportunities.proposed_solution: Sign off §1.3 Engineering column; escalate any copy that implies automation or guarantees the codebase cannot support.

risks_p1.title: Saved files have no version number
risks_p1.note: If the room file format changes, old saved rooms could break without any warning. Needs to be fixed before the next format update ships.

founder_decisions.title: Copilot program — commercial bar, benchmark timing, and model switch criteria
founder_decisions.note: Same decision as orchestration-status.json founder decisions; engineering executes the benchmark after sign-off.

actions.name: Code Review
actions.description: Review a PR or code change for CLAUDE.md compliance, architectural concerns, and export schema safety.
actions.trigger: Any PR or code change flagged for architecture or compliance review

actions.name: Architecture Spike
actions.description: Evaluate a new feature's technical approach and produce a trade-off analysis with a recommendation.
actions.trigger: New feature with uncertain technical approach

actions.name: Schema Review
actions.description: Assess a proposed JSON export schema change for breaking changes and recommend a versioning strategy.
actions.trigger: Any proposed change to a JSON export schema

actions.name: Performance Audit
actions.description: Identify canvas or runtime bottlenecks and recommend dirty-rect, OffscreenCanvas, or other fixes.
